name: @zeldrisho/pi-zeldrova
description: Monorepo for independently published Pi extensions.

scripts.validate: vp check && vp test --coverage && vp run test:contracts && vp run pack:dry-run && vp run test:packages
scripts.pack:dry-run: for package in packages/*; do (cd "$package" && vp pm pack -- --dry-run) || exit; done
